title: O'Reilly's (ORLY) Q4 Earnings Top Estimates on Comps Growth
text: O'Reilly (ORLY) reports solid results in Q4 on steady growth in comparable store sales year over year. As of Dec 31, 2021, its total store count totaled 5,784, including new outlets.

title: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 27.33% and 7.33%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
